scan.title: KAYAN SWEETS
scan.description: Tap continue to collect your stamp.

confirmed.title: A sweet visit awaits.
confirmed.body: We've matched the QR to a branch. Tap below to record your visit.

invalid.title: We don't know that branch.
invalid.body: This QR didn't match an active branch. Please ask a staff member.

welcome.title: Scan to earn a stamp.
welcome.body: Scan the QR at the counter on your next visit to collect a stamp.

phone.title: Enter your mobile number
phone.subtitle: Let's start collecting your stamps
phone.description: We'll text a 4-digit code. Your number is your loyalty card.
phone.terms: By continuing you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.

errors.format: Enter a 9-digit Saudi mobile starting with 5.

registerDetails.title: TELL US ABOUT YOU
registerDetails.description: A few details, then you're stamped & in.
registerDetails.consentLabel: I agree to receive promotional messages from Kayan Sweets.

scanAmount.title: ENTER BILL AMOUNT
scanAmount.description: We log it with your stamp so we know which treats deserve more shelf space.

errors.range: Amount must be between {{min}} and {{max}} SAR.

stampSuccess.title: +1 STAMP
stampSuccess.headline:
Sweet,
{{name}}.
stampSuccess.cardCompleteDescription: Amazing, {{name}}! Your reward is ready to claim.
stampSuccess.cardCompleteMessage: You filled your card — a fresh one starts next visit.
stampSuccess.description: Nice one, {{name}}. See you again soon.
stampSuccess.nextReward: Stamp added. {{count}} more visits and dessert is on the house.
stampSuccess.cardFull: You filled the card. A free dessert tray is waiting in Rewards.

lockout.title: COME BACK TOMORROW
lockout.body: We only add one stamp per day so the card stays fair for everyone.
lockout.description: You've already earned a stamp today. Your next stamp is available {{when}}.

notFound.headline: Crumbs.
notFound.body: We can't find that page. It may have been replaced with something tastier.

rewards.title: MY REWARDS
rewards.headline: Rewards.
rewards.description: Your current progress and active rewards.
rewards.emptyAvailable: Keep earning stamps — your first treat is on us at 10.
rewards.emptyHistory: You haven't claimed any rewards yet.
rewards.rewardReadyBelow: Your reward is ready — claim it below 🎉

rateUs.title: Rate us on Google
rateUs.subtitle: Tell us how we're doing — it takes a moment.

rewardClaim.title: CLAIM AT BRANCH
rewardClaim.description: Show this screen to the cashier. They'll scan the branch QR to verify.
rewardClaim.notFound: That reward could not be found.
rewardClaim.showToCashier: Show this screen to your cashier
rewardClaim.selectBranchHint: Pick the branch where you're claiming this reward.

rewardConfirm.title: Confirm redemption
rewardConfirm.description: Customer is handing you their phone. Verify and tap below.

rewardDone.title: REDEEMED
rewardDone.headline:
Enjoy
every bite.
rewardDone.description: Your reward has been redeemed. Thanks for being a Kayan regular.

errors.network: No connection. Please check your internet and try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.
errors.otpInvalid: That code doesn't match. Check and try again.
errors.otpExpired: That code expired. Request a new one.
errors.phoneInvalid: Phone number format is not valid.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

prompt.title: Add Kayan to your home screen

offline.title: You're offline
offline.description: Check your connection and try again.

home.description: Here's your stamp card and progress.
home.rewardReadyBelow: Your reward is ready — claim it from Rewards 🎉
home.scanAtCounterBody: Scan the branch QR at the counter on your next visit.
